posts.text: Anthropic Eyes $30B Raise At $900B Valuation As UBS Says Claude Is "Gaining Ground" https://www.zerohedge.com/ai/anthropic-eyes-30b-raise-900b-ubs-says-claude-gaining-ground

posts.text:
♦️ Pete Hegseth defends proposed $1.5trn budget before Congress.

♦️ The senate confirms Kevin Warsh to the Fed’s board of governors.

♦️ Marty Makary resigns as commissioner of the Food and Drug Administration.

Follow the latest from the US in brief: https://www.economist.com/in-brief/2026/05/13/the-us-in-brief-hegseth-on-the-defence?taid=6a04656976997b0001c3de2f&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
